_llm_prompt: You are analyzing an image of a Japanese financial document. Classify it and extract data into the JSON structure below. RULES: (1) Set document_type to 'receipt' for store purchases, 'utility_bill' for gas/water/electric bills, or 'payment_slip' for bank transfer or convenience store payment slips. (2) Use null for any field you cannot confidently determine. (3) Amounts are numbers without currency symbols. (4) Dates are YYYY-MM-DD. Japanese era: 令和7年=2025, 令和8年=2026. (5) For date: use payment date if visible, else due date for bills, else transaction date for receipts. (5b) For time: 24-hour HH:MM transaction time printed alongside the date (e.g., '17:05', '13時30分'); null if absent or only present as business hours. (6) payment_method: null unless explicitly stated. Use 'bank_payment' only if the document says 口座引落 or 振替. Use 'cash' only if お預り or 現計 is shown. (7) points_used: loyalty points applied (d-point, WAON point, etc.) as a number. amount_paid = total - points_used. (8) For receipts: extract all line items with prices. tax_category per item: '8%' for items marked ※/軽, '10%' for standard, '0%' if unknown. (9) For utility bills: extract meter readings, usage amount, service type, billing period. (10) For payment slips: merchant is the company receiving the money. payer is who pays. (11) Only fill type-specific sections relevant to the document_type. Leave others null/empty.
_comment_line_items_per_weight: When an item is priced per unit weight (e.g. 281 yen per 100g, 467g purchased, total 1313 yen), do NOT encode the per-weight rate. Use qty=1, unit_price=total, total=total. The schema's qty*unit_price=total invariant assumes a 1:1 unit ratio, and the per-weight rate is not used downstream.
_comment_payment_method: Allowed values: 'cash', 'credit', 'debit', 'bank_payment', 'WAON', or null. Do NOT use 'credit_card' (use 'credit'). Use 'cash' only if お預り or 現計 is on the receipt — 上記正に領収いたしました alone is NOT enough.
_comment_time: Only extract a printed transaction time (e.g. '2026年3月30日 (月) 16:21'). Do NOT extract from barcode/serial-suffix lines like '14:10-2109-01>' — they look like times but are not.
_comment_subtotal: Pre-tax base amount, ALWAYS computed as subtotal = total - sum(taxes), regardless of 内税 / 外税 / 非課税. For 0-tax receipts (no taxes or all taxes = 0) subtotal = total. For 内税 receipts where line item prices are post-tax, sum(line_items) will equal total, NOT subtotal — that is expected. Use null only when total is also unknown.

taxes._comment_label: Canonical labels only: '内税' (tax-inclusive), '外税' (tax-exclusive), or '非課税' (tax-exempt). Do NOT use raw receipt text like '内消費税額'.
taxes._comment_zero_amount: Omit tax entries where amount=0. Only include rates with non-zero tax amounts. Exception: rate '0%' (non-taxable) may have amount=0.
